item.title: Container home build update!!! вА¶ Window restoration complete в...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Container home build update!!! вА¶ Window restoration complete вЬЕ Frames and casements that have glass, off getting double glazed glass installed вЬЕ Steels angle frames made for half of my windows вЬЕ These containers are about to start looking like a house and IвАЩm so bloody excited for it рЯШН

item.title: What are these pretty little steel frames? рЯ§ФвА¶ IвАЩm making ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


What are these pretty little steel frames? рЯ§ФвА¶ IвАЩm making them for my timber windows to be installed into! рЯ™µ This not only gives back the structural integrity IвАЩm taking from the containers by cutting into them for windows but also gives the timber windows a nice and neat frame to be installed into! рЯШН

item.title: Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple steps? рЯ§ѓ Make sure you check the local laws in your area if your in Aus and if you arenвАЩt allowed to harvest (which is common) you can buy the Xanthorrhoea resin online рЯ•∞ IвАЩm applying to get a license to sell mine, fingers crossed and if I get it youвАЩll be the first to know! рЯМ±

item.title: ItвАЩs Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows IвАЩve be...
item.description:
Full post Embed


ItвАЩs Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows IвАЩve been restoring for what feels like a life time! рЯШЭ I couldnвАЩt be more happy with how it turned out! ItвАЩs high quality waterproof and termite resistant home made varnish straight from my homestead! Let me know if you want a reel on how to make it рЯШЭрЯСЗ

item.title: It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have fi...
item.description:
Full post Embed


It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have finally finished repairing and restoring my Jarrah timber windows for my container house! рЯ§ѓрЯШЭ Look I have no regrets IвАЩm a sucker for hard work and big time savings but IвАЩm just going to take this moment to say вА¶ вА¶ THANK F*** thats over! рЯШВрЯ§¶вАНвЩАпЄП

item.title: Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IвАЩve ever saved рЯШЭ For refere...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IвАЩve ever saved рЯШЭ For reference IвАЩll be using these logs in my house as posts for the areas where I am making big cut outs or removing entire walls (thereвАЩs currently acroprops in their place at the moment ) IвАЩll also be using them for the porch roof IвАЩll be building around my container house over my wrap around deck рЯШН
